result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate Test Report From Provided Input

Usage:
  LiquidTestReports.Cli [options]

Options:
  --inputs <inputs>            Array of formatted configuration strings for test report inputs
                                           - File=file-name - The path of the input file.
                                           - GroupTitle=group-title - Optional title to group reports under, test runs with the same group title will be merged.
                                           - TestPrefix=test-prefix - Optional test suffix, if provided test origination for the provided report will have the suffix appended to its name.
                                           example: "File=TestRun1.trx;GroupTitle=Integration Tests;TestSuffix=UAT".
  --output-file <output-file>  Path to save test report to.
  --title <title>              Optional overall report title displayed in default report template. [default: Test Run]
  --template <template>        Optional user defined liquid template. Defaults to multi report markdown template is used. []
  --parameters <parameters>    Optional user defined parameters. []
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
